# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

# cloud-sql-postgres.yaml
# Cloud SQL PostgreSQL Deployment Manager Template - SECURE VERSION

resources:
- name: staging-postgres-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-2-7680
      dataDiskSizeGb: 20
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
        pointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        # USE PRIVATE IP INSTEAD OF PUBLIC with authorized networks
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.staging-network.selfLink)
        requireSsl: true
        # If you MUST use public IP, restrict to specific IPs only:
        # ipv4Enabled: true
        # requireSsl: true
        # authorizedNetworks:
        #   - name: office-vpn
        #     value: YOUR_OFFICE_IP/32    # Replace with actual IP
        #   - name: ci-cd-runner
        #     value: YOUR_CI_CD_IP/32     # Replace with actual IP
      databaseFlags:
        - name: log_connections
          value: "on"
        - name: log_disconnections
          value: "on"
        - name: log_statement
          value: "ddl"
    # ROOT PASSWORD: Set via gcloud CLI AFTER deployment, not in template
    # Run: gcloud sql users set-password postgres --instance=staging-postgres-instance --prompt-for-password

- name: staging-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false

- name: staging-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.staging-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.10.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true

- name: staging-sql-private-ip-range
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
    addressType: INTERNAL
    prefixLength: 16
    network: $(ref.staging-network.selfLink)

- name: staging-sql-private-connection
  type: servicenetworking.v1.connection
  properties:
    network: $(ref.staging-network.selfLink)
    reservedPeeringRanges:
      - $(ref.staging-sql-private-ip-range.name)
    service: servicenetworking.googleapis.com

- name: staging-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
    name: staging_app_db
    charset: UTF8

outputs:
- name: instanceName
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
- name: connectionName
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.connectionName)
# Post-deployment steps:
# 1. Set password securely:
#    gcloud sql users set-password postgres --instance=staging-postgres-instance --prompt-for-password
# 2. Connect via Cloud SQL Auth Proxy instead of direct IP:
#    cloud-sql-proxy --private-ip $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.connectionName)
